---
# ================================================================
# LEAVING LAB FORM — edit only the top section
# ================================================================
#
# lab_name        shown in the form title and email subject line
# recipient_email address the completed form is sent to
#
# submitter_fields  "About You" inputs (name, email, …)
# checklist         required tick-boxes before submission
#
# project_groups → fields:
#   key           internal ID, no spaces, must be unique within a group
#   label         text shown above the input
#   placeholder   example path shown inside the input field (greyed out)
#   hint          optional note shown below the field (omit if not needed)
#   required      true / false
#   full          true = spans the full width instead of half (optional)

title: "Leaving Lab Form"
params:
  lab_name: "Visual Neuroscience Lab"
  recipient_email: "natalia.zaretskaya@uni-graz.at"
  submitter_fields:
    value:
      - key: name
        label: "Name"
        required: true
      - key: email
        label: "E-mail"
        required: true
        type: email
        hint: "e.g. you@uni-graz.at"
  checklist:
    value:
      - key: data_private_deleted
        label: "All subjects' private data irrelevant for research (e.g. bank account info) deleted from server, institute computers, and personal devices"
        required: true
      - key: data_incidental
        label: "All incidental findings have been clarified; subjects' contact information deleted"
        required: true
  project_groups:
    value:
      - label: Stimulus
        fields:
          - key: stimulus_script
            label: "Stimulus script"
            full: true
            placeholder: "/storage/yourname/project/stim.m"
            hint: "Server path to the final version used in the MRI/behavioral lab"
      - label: "Raw data"
        fields:
          - key: data_behavioral
            label: Behavioral
            placeholder: "/storage/nv_shared/projects/yourproject/matfiles/"
          - key: data_eyetracking
            label: Eyetracking
            placeholder: "/storage/nv_shared/projects/yourproject/eyetracking/"
          - key: data_physiology
            label: Physiology
            placeholder: "/storage/nv_shared/projects/yourproject/physiology/"
          - key: data_mri
            label: "(f)MRI"
            placeholder: "/storage/nv_shared/projects/yourproject/bids/"
          - key: data_mri_protocol
            label: "MRI protocol PDF"
            placeholder: "/storage/nv_shared/projects/yourproject/protocol.pdf"
      - label: Analysis
        fields:
          - key: analysis_scripts
            label: "Subject-level scripts"
            placeholder: "/storage/yourname/project/analyze_struc.sh"
            hint: "Including preprocessing"
          - key: subject_results
            label: "Subject-level results"
            placeholder: "/storage/yourname/project/bids/derivatives/"
          - key: group_scripts
            label: "Group analysis scripts"
            placeholder: "/storage/yourname/project/bids/code/analyze_final.m"
          - key: group_results
            label: "Group results"
            placeholder: "/storage/yourname/project/group_results/"
      - label: Outputs
        fields:
          - key: manuscript
            label: "Manuscript / thesis"
            placeholder: "/storage/yourname/project/manuscript/"
            hint: "Latest submitted version with rebuttal. Master students: UGOnline-submitted thesis (Word preferred)"
          - key: posters
            label: "Posters & conference abstracts"
            placeholder: "/storage/yourname/project/presentations/"
          - key: consent_forms
            label: "Consent forms location"
            placeholder: "Paper – corner office, rightmost drawer"
            hint: "Server path if electronic, or physical location"
# ================================================================
# STOP editing here
# ================================================================
---

Fill in all fields for each project, then click **Prepare submission** to download your form or send it directly via email.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
cat(paste0('<script>\nconst CONFIG = ', jsonlite::toJSON(params, auto_unbox = TRUE), ';\n</script>\n'))
```

```{=html}
<div id="lf-root"></div>

<div id="lf-actions" style="display:none" class="mt-4">
  <div class="card shadow-sm" style="border-left: 4px solid #2c6fad">
    <div class="card-body">
      <h5 class="card-title mb-2">Your form is ready to send</h5>
      <p class="mb-3" style="font-size:.9rem">
        Send your submission to <span id="lf-recipient"></span>: download and attach the <code>.md</code> file, or use <strong>Open email client</strong> to send the content directly as email text.
      </p>
      <div class="d-flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
        <button class="lf-btn lf-btn-primary" onclick="lfDownload()">Download .md</button>
        <button class="lf-btn lf-btn-outline" onclick="lfEmail()">Open email client</button>
      </div>
      <textarea id="lf-preview" style="display:none" readonly></textarea>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* Project blocks and group labels — everything else is Bootstrap */
.lf-project {
  border: 2px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: .5rem;
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  position: relative;
}
.lf-project h3 {
  font-size: .85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .06em;
  margin: 0 0 .75rem;
}
.lf-group-label {
  font-size: .75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .07em;
  color: #2c6fad;
  margin: 1.1rem 0 .4rem;
  padding-bottom: .25rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}
.lf-two-col { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: .5rem .75rem; }
.lf-two-col .lf-full { grid-column: 1/-1; }
@media (max-width: 560px) { .lf-two-col { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.lf-add-btn {
  width: 100%; padding: .6rem;
  border: 2px dashed #adb5bd; border-radius: .4rem;
  background: none; color: #6c757d; cursor: pointer; font-size: .88rem;
  margin-top: .25rem;
}
.lf-add-btn:hover { border-color: #2c6fad; color: #2c6fad; }
/* Buttons — bypass Bootstrap's primary color which may be themed */
.lf-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: .45rem 1.2rem;
  font-size: .9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  border-radius: .375rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.lf-btn-primary { background: #2c6fad; color: #fff; border-color: #2c6fad; }
.lf-btn-primary:hover { background: #245d96; border-color: #245d96; color: #fff; }
.lf-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #2c6fad; border-color: #2c6fad; }
.lf-btn-outline:hover { background: #2c6fad; color: #fff; }
/* Input visibility: blue-grey bg in white cards, white in grey project blocks */
#lf-root .card .form-control {
  background-color: #eef1f5;
  border-color: #8a9ab0;
}
#lf-root .card .form-control:focus {
  background-color: #fff;
  border-color: #2c6fad;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 .25rem rgba(44,111,173,.15);
}
.lf-project .form-control-sm {
  background-color: #fff;
  border-color: #8a9ab0;
}
.lf-project .form-control-sm:focus {
  border-color: #2c6fad;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 .2rem rgba(44,111,173,.15);
}
#lf-root .form-check-input {
  border-color: #8a9ab0;
}
#lf-root .form-check-input:not(:checked) {
  background-color: #eef1f5;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<script>
let lfContainerEl = null;

function lfEsc(s) {
  return String(s ?? '')
    .replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')
    .replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
}

function lfClickAnchor(href, download) {
  const a = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), {href});
  if (download) a.download = download;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
}

function lfCard(title, inner) {
  return '<div class="card mb-4"><div class="card-body">'
    + `<h5 class="card-title border-bottom pb-2 mb-3 text-uppercase fw-bold" style="font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:.06em">${title}</h5>`
    + inner + '</div></div>';
}

function lfField(idx, f, values) {
  const val = lfEsc(values[f.key] || '');
  const ph = f.placeholder ? ` placeholder="${lfEsc(f.placeholder)}"` : '';
  const input = f.type === 'textarea'
    ? `<textarea class="form-control form-control-sm" name="projects[${idx}][${f.key}]" rows="2"${ph}>${val}</textarea>`
    : `<input class="form-control form-control-sm" type="text" name="projects[${idx}][${f.key}]" value="${val}"${ph}>`;
  return `<div class="mb-2${f.full ? ' lf-full' : ''}">
    <label class="form-label fw-semibold mb-1" style="font-size:.83rem">
      ${lfEsc(f.label)}${f.required ? ' <span class="text-danger">*</span>' : ''}
    </label>
    ${input}
    ${f.hint ? `<div class="form-text">${lfEsc(f.hint)}</div>` : ''}
  </div>`;
}

function lfAddProject(values = {}) {
  const idx = lfContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.lf-project').length;
  const block = document.createElement('div');
  block.className = 'lf-project';
  let html = idx > 0
    ? `<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2"
         onclick="this.closest('.lf-project').remove(); lfRenumber()">Remove</button>`
    : '';
  html += `<h3>Project ${idx + 1}</h3>
  <div class="mb-2">
    <label class="form-label fw-semibold mb-1" style="font-size:.83rem">
      Project nickname <span class="text-danger">*</span>
    </label>
    <input class="form-control form-control-sm" type="text"
      name="projects[${idx}][nickname]" required placeholder="e.g. hexcite"
      value="${lfEsc(values.nickname || '')}">
  </div>`;
  for (const group of CONFIG.project_groups) {
    html += `<div class="lf-group-label">${lfEsc(group.label)}`;
    if (group.note) html += ` <span class="fw-normal text-muted" style="font-size:.75rem;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0">${lfEsc(group.note)}</span>`;
    html += `</div><div class="lf-two-col">`;
    for (const f of group.fields) html += lfField(idx, f, values);
    html += `</div>`;
  }
  block.innerHTML = html;
  lfContainerEl.appendChild(block);
}

function lfRenumber() {
  lfContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.lf-project').forEach((block, i) => {
    block.querySelector('h3').textContent = `Project ${i + 1}`;
    block.querySelectorAll('[name^="projects["]').forEach(el => {
      el.name = el.name.replace(/^projects\[\d+\]/, `projects[${i}]`);
    });
  });
}

function lfBuildMarkdown(form) {
  const date = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {year:'numeric', month:'long', day:'numeric'});
  let md = `# ${CONFIG.lab_name}: Leaving Submission\n\n`;
  md += `**Date:** ${date}  \n`;
  CONFIG.submitter_fields.forEach(sf => {
    const val = form.querySelector(`[name="submitter[${sf.key}]"]`)?.value?.trim() || '';
    md += `**${sf.label}:** ${val}  \n`;
  });
  md += '\n## Data Checklist\n\n';
  CONFIG.checklist.forEach(item => {
    if (item.title) { md += `\n**${item.title}**\n\n`; return; }
    const checked = form.querySelector(`#lf_chk_${item.key}`)?.checked;
    md += `- [${checked ? 'x' : ' '}] ${item.label}\n`;
  });
  form.querySelectorAll('.lf-project').forEach((block, i) => {
    const nick = block.querySelector(`[name="projects[${i}][nickname]"]`)?.value?.trim() || '';
    md += `\n## Project ${i + 1}${nick ? ': ' + nick : ''}\n`;
    CONFIG.project_groups.forEach(group => {
      md += `\n### ${group.label}\n\n`;
      md += `| Field | Path / Location |\n| --- | --- |\n`;
      group.fields.forEach(field => {
        const val = block.querySelector(`[name="projects[${i}][${field.key}]"]`)?.value?.trim() || '';
        md += `| ${field.label} | ${val} |\n`;
      });
    });
  });
  return md;
}

function lfDownload() {
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([document.getElementById('lf-preview').value], {type: 'text/markdown'}));
  lfClickAnchor(url, 'leaving-lab-form.md');
  setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
}

function lfEmail() {
  lfClickAnchor(
    `mailto:${CONFIG.recipient_email}`
      + `?subject=${encodeURIComponent('[' + CONFIG.lab_name + '] Leaving submission')}`
      + `&body=${encodeURIComponent(document.getElementById('lf-preview').value)}`
  );
}

function lfHandleSubmit(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  document.getElementById('lf-preview').value = lfBuildMarkdown(e.target);
  const el = document.getElementById('lf-actions');
  el.style.display = 'block';
  el.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'});
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const root = document.getElementById('lf-root');

  let submitterHtml = '';
  CONFIG.submitter_fields.forEach(sf => {
    submitterHtml += `<div class="mb-3">
      <label class="form-label fw-semibold mb-1" style="font-size:.85rem">
        ${lfEsc(sf.label)}${sf.required ? ' <span class="text-danger">*</span>' : ''}
      </label>
      <input type="${sf.type || 'text'}" class="form-control" name="submitter[${sf.key}]" ${sf.required ? 'required' : ''}>
      ${sf.hint ? `<div class="form-text">${lfEsc(sf.hint)}</div>` : ''}
    </div>`;
  });

  let checklistHtml = '';
  CONFIG.checklist.forEach(item => {
    if (item.title) {
      checklistHtml += `<p class="text-uppercase fw-bold text-secondary mt-3 mb-1" style="font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.07em">${lfEsc(item.title)}</p>`;
    } else {
      const k = lfEsc(item.key);
      checklistHtml += `<div class="form-check mb-2">
        <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="lf_chk_${k}" ${item.required ? 'required' : ''}>
        <label class="form-check-label small" for="lf_chk_${k}">${lfEsc(item.label)}${item.required ? ' <span class="text-danger">*</span>' : ''}</label>
      </div>`;
    }
  });

  root.innerHTML = '<form id="lf-form">'
    + lfCard('About You', submitterHtml)
    + lfCard('Data Checklist', checklistHtml)
    + lfCard('Projects', '<div id="lf-projects-container"></div>'
        + '<button type="button" class="lf-add-btn" onclick="lfAddProject()">+ Add another project</button>')
    + '<div class="text-end mt-3"><button type="submit" class="lf-btn lf-btn-primary" style="font-size:1rem;padding:.55rem 2rem">Prepare submission &rarr;</button></div>'
    + '</form>';

  lfContainerEl = document.getElementById('lf-projects-container');
  lfAddProject();
  document.getElementById('lf-form').addEventListener('submit', lfHandleSubmit);

  const recipientEl = document.getElementById('lf-recipient');
  if (recipientEl) {
    recipientEl.innerHTML = `<a href="mailto:${CONFIG.recipient_email}">${lfEsc(CONFIG.recipient_email)}</a>`;
  }
});
</script>
```
